---
title: 'ASV: Accelerated Stereo Vision System'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Paul Whatmough
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/micro19-asv.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/asv-accelerated-stereo-vision-system
journ: MICRO
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/asv-accelerated-stereo-vision-system-fb3e7faf-8c02-40ef-9ed5-974f67d0281b
pub_number: 33
---
